sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Bell, ArrowUpRight, ArrowDownLeft } from 'lucide-react'; import NestLogo from '../components/NestLogo'; import { formatCurrency } from '../helpers/helpers'; export default function HomeScreen({ balance, setModal, getGreeting, userName, transactions }) { return (
{/* Header */}

{getGreeting()},

{userName}

{/* Total Balance Card */}
Total Balance
${formatCurrency(balance)}
{/* Transactions */}

Recent Transactions

{transactions.map((t) => (
alert(`Transaction: ${t.title}\nAmount: $${t.amount}\nDate: ${t.date}`)} className="flex items-center justify-between bg-white p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-50 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50">
{t.type==='deposit'?:}

{t.title}

{t.date}

{t.type==='deposit'?'+':'-'}${formatCurrency(t.amount)}
))}
); }
